steps.expected: Hero block shows full-width background image, dark overlay, centered title/subtitle
steps.observed: Hero rendered with outer container `relative w-full h-96 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden`, overlay `absolute inset-0 bg-black/50`, and centered text wrapper `relative z-10 text-center text-white px-4` containing `h1.text-4xl.font-bold` (UT Full EN Title) and `p.text-xl.mt-2` (UT Full EN Subtitle).

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors check on desktop/mobile returned empty)

steps.expected: Two-column layout with image left, text right, and preserved line breaks
steps.observed:
Grid rendered as `grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6` with computed columns `708px 708px`; child[0] is image container `relative aspect-square overflow-hidden` with `img.object-cover`; child[1] is `flex items-center` containing `p.whitespace-pre-wrap` with computed white-space `pre-wrap` and text `UT EN image-left line 1
UT EN image-left line 2`.

steps.action: Set viewport to 390x844 and reload fixture page
steps.observed: Same responsive class present (`grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6`) and computed mobile grid columns is `390px` (single column); child order is image first then text, confirming stacked layout.

assertions.title: ICON_TEXT_ROW renders responsive grid of cards

steps.expected: 3-column card grid with centered icon + text
steps.observed: Grid class is `grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4`; computed desktop columns are `469.328px 469.328px 469.344px`; 3 cards rendered with labels Quality/Sustainable/Handcrafted; each card class `flex flex-col items-center p-4` and icon wrapper `relative w-16 h-16` (computed image size 64x64).
Computed mobile columns are `390px` (1 column) with same 3 cards stacked vertically.

assertions.title: BOTTOM_IMAGE_TEXT renders image with text overlay

steps.action: Inspect bottom image text block in DOM
steps.expected: Fixed-height image container with dark overlay and centered text
steps.observed: Block rendered as `div.relative.h-64` with child `img.object-cover` and overlay child `div.absolute.inset-0.bg-black/40.flex.items-center.justify-center` containing `p.text-white.text-2xl.font-bold` text `Visit Us Today`.

assertions.title: TEXT_BLOCK renders plain text with line breaks

steps.expected: Padded container with preserved line breaks
steps.observed:
Paragraph rendered with class `whitespace-pre-wrap` and computed `white-space: pre-wrap`; padded ancestor class is `p-6`; text sample preserved as `Paragraph one.

Paragraph two.
Line three.`

steps.action: Inspect DOM order indexes for key block anchors
steps.observed: Observed ascending DOM indexes: BACKGROUND_TITLE=125, IMAGE_TEXT_BLOCK=131, ICON_TEXT_ROW=133, BOTTOM_IMAGE_TEXT=145, TEXT_BLOCK=150, matching required order.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request logging did not return per-request status codes in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used curl status checks for document and Next image URLs while keeping DOM/layout validation in agent-browser.

summary: Re-ran 7 assigned assertions after setup fix; all 7 passed on fixture /en/ut-cv-full-353a918a with desktop+mobile checks and DOM class/order verification.
